name: carbon-footprint-awareness-platform
description: AI-powered carbon footprint awareness platform with 12+ Google tool integrations. Estimates monthly CO₂e, ranks impact categories, and generates personalized action plans.

scripts.test: node --test tests/footprint.test.js tests/google-tools.test.js tests/security.test.js tests/validators.test.js tests/analytics.test.js tests/accessibility.test.js
scripts.lint: node --check src/footprint.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check tests/footprint.test.js && node --check scripts/serve.mjs && node --check scripts/check-size.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run size
